headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -110.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 43% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 143 quotes, including 114 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 81.8 sits in the middle of the 84-day range, showing typical elevated complaint levels for this period.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's very low point, while optimism remains stuck near historical lows.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
